description: Single country outline with animated border draw, pulse rings, stats, and context panel. Supports: USA, UK, RUSSIA, CHINA, NORTHKOREA, IRAN, UKRAINE, ISRAEL, KENYA, GERMANY

fields.MAP_LABEL_1: Country key — must be one of: USA, UK, RUSSIA, CHINA, NORTHKOREA, IRAN, UKRAINE, ISRAEL, KENYA, GERMANY
fields.TAG_1: Tag line under country name, e.g. 'STATE-SPONSORED ACTOR' or 'PRIMARY TARGET'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: 2-3 sentence context about the country and its role in the story
